title: Multimodal support is now available
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports multimodal inputs for Databricks hosted foundation models. See [Query vision models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-vision-models).

This multimodal support is available using the following functionalities:

* [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
* [Foundation Model APIs provisioned throughput](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#throughput).
* [AI Functions](/aws/en/large-language-models/ai-functions). Both real-time inference and batch inference workloads.
